title: Campfire GUI
description: This mod adds a read-only inspection GUI to campfires.
body:
![Campfire GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69d57de890b1a104db4cf91b2d188c6c8190d5a2.gif)
FEATURES
Inspection ScreenDisplays a read-only GUI for the vanilla campfires
Live Progress BarsEach occupied slot displays a bar below it that fills as the item cooks
Animated FireThe flame animation plays when the campfire is lit and stops when it is not
Slot TooltipsHovering a slot shows the item name and the exact time remaining
HOW TO USE
Regular Right-Click (without sneaking) places raw food items on a campfire the vanilla way. - ![Shift](https://img.shields.io/badge/Shift-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff)![+](https://img.shields.io/badge/+-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff)![Right Click](https://img.shields.io/badge/Right%20Click-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) a Campfire while holding nothing or any item. - The Campfire GUI panel opens showing 4 read-only slots. Items cannot be moved from within the GUI. - Press ![Esc](https://img.shields.io/badge/Esc-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) or ![E](https://img.shields.io/badge/E-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) to close it.
REQUIREMENTS
* Fabric Loader * Fabric API
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and server, requiring the mod to be installed on both sides.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: * Leaving a rating/review * Sharing it with friends * Reporting any bugs you find
GALLERY
Unlit Campfire GUI ![Unlit Campfire GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fbe6ea7ae94735be5aadf379e8c1be4bd70b7bd.png) Soul Campfire GUI ![Soul Campfire GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddf9d227140e847beee482304a99ff00760d2462.gif)
